entities.name: PLANT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The qualitative and quantitative assessment of plant growth in its growth environment

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The application of data collection to improve crop characteristics

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT PLANT PHENOTYPING (HTPP)
entities.description: An automated, image-based process for rapid and precise plant assessment

entities.name: CONTROLLED ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: A setting where plants are moved to phenotyping platforms for assessment

entities.name: OPEN-FIELD PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of phenotyping plants in their natural field growth environment

entities.name: SATELLITE-BASED REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: The use of satellite imagery for field-scale phenotyping

entities.name: UNMANNED AERIAL VEHICLE (UAV)
entities.description: Drone-assisted image-based HTPP used for high-resolution open-field phenotyping

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A quantitative trait measured using UAV-assisted HTPP

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: A quantitative trait measured using UAV-assisted HTPP

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A quantitative trait measured using UAV-assisted HTPP

entities.name: LEAF NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: A qualitative trait measured using UAV-assisted HTPP

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Biological stress in plants quantified via UAV-assisted HTPP

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-biological stress in plants quantified via UAV-assisted HTPP

entities.name: SELECTIVE BREEDING PROCESS
entities.description: The process of choosing parent plants for breeding, assisted by HTPP

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Plants subjected to trait estimation and phenotyping
